name: Clasp of Sonic Protection
description: This deep purple crystal gives off a faint hum, and rings with a sonorous chime when tapped. As a lesser crystal of energy protection, it grants resistance 10 against sonic. Once the crystal has prevented a total of 50 points of sonic damage, it becomes inert until the following day.
unidentifiedDesc: A faintly humming purple stone that occasionally chimes softly.
